$comment: Source of truth for Godot-vs-React parity. Rendered to docs/godot-parity-matrix.html by tools/build-parity-matrix.mjs. Validated by tools/check-parity-matrix.mjs (CI). One row per React surface.

milestones.title: UI Foundation: Theme + scenes + router + signal bus
Testing parity: GdUnit4 + e2e + visual golden-diff

rows.feature_or_screen: Board chain mechanic (drag, 8-way adjacency, min-chain, boss bar)
rows.note: is_valid_chain/has_valid_chain ported from src/game/chain.ts; boss min_chain raises the bar.
Pure collapse()+refill() (weighted pool) plus animated visual collapse/pop-in; reshuffles dead boards.

rows.feature_or_screen: Economy: coins / inventory / fractional progress accumulator
rows.note: credit_chain reproduces React resourceProgress carry-over exactly; storage cap enforced. Coins simplified (chain_len/2).
5-tier ladder with caps/plots/unlocks and deadlock-free escalating costs; can_tier_up/try_tier_up wired + tested.
sell/buy with cap discipline + markup (sink not arbitrage); buy logic tested but TownScreen is sell-only (no UI surface).
Seeded RNG generation, refill to MAX_ORDERS, fill_order with reward > market incentive; wired to TownScreen.
enter_mine converts supplies->turns, mine pool swaps board, soft-fail on turn exhaustion, leave_mine. Single shared inventory.
start_boss gating (City + mine mastery), raises min_chain, damage_boss by chain length, defeat sets town2_complete. One boss.
RAT tiles seed farm pool once town2_complete; Ratcatcher + Master Ratcatcher. Rat tile art authored and fed (M7a, run_assets_tests — 40 checks).
RUBBLE seeds mine pool; cleared by STONE chains sweeping 8-adjacent rubble. Rubble tile art authored and fed (M7a, run_assets_tests — 40 checks).
Versioned JSON to user://save.json, mismatched versions discarded; from_dict defensively parsed. Round-trip tested.
Synthesizes every SFX as 16-bit PCM AudioStreamWAV, ported 1:1 from src/audio/index.ts. Pooled players, mute pref persisted.
Read-only grouped ledger (Farm/Refined/Mine/Other) with counts, sell prices, line + total value. Pure compute helpers tested.
build/demolish/plot-gating works as LOGIC (spawner adds tile category to refill pool). Spatial placement map is the M6 gap; catalog is a 7-building subset.
TownScreen.gd list-modal of build/refine/market/orders/expedition rows; every button registered under a stable key for tests. Spatial map is M6.

ToolConfig catalog (10 tools) + pure ToolEffects + GameState tool API (charges/arm-fire/credit via credit_chain) + live-board apply with tap-targeting + ToolPalette HUD + minimal starter grant. Full 59-tool catalog, passive abilities, and the magic/portal influence economy are still pending.
Tween juice exists (fly-to-coins chip, pop-in, chain glow); lacks GPUParticles, cascade/refill tweening, seasonal tint, floaters.

DROPPED (intentionally out of scope). The React calendar-season cycle was REMOVED in Phase 7 — SEASONS is pure visual metadata with no gameplay effect. The port keeps a monotonic turn counter. Not a parity gap.

Beat/flag/trigger/choice engine (condition tree) wired at chain/tier/boss/build/order/session events; 13 port-reachable beats; beat modal + chronicle view. NPC-bond/keeper/zone-gated beats omitted (those systems unported).
3 biomes (farm/mine/harbor) reachable via expeditions + a world-map navigation view. Full multi-zone settlement model (founding, per-zone inventory, discovery) deferred.

5-NPC roster (wren/Scout, mira/Baker, tomas/Beekeeper, bram/Smith, liss/Physician) + 0–10 float bond (Sour ×0.70 / Warm ×1.00 / Liked ×1.15 / Beloved ×1.25 tiers) wired into orders (each order belongs to an NPC; fill grants +0.3 bond; bond tier multiplies reward) + townsfolk roster view (TownsfolkScreen.gd — color avatar, name, role, bond bar tinted by tier). Additive: default bond 5 ×1.00 keeps orders tests green unedited. Workers system, NPC gifts, per-NPC dialog pools, and bond decay are deferred.

19 port-reachable counter/threshold trophies tracked at chain/order/build/boss events with one-time rewards + save/load; grouped trophy view (AchievementsScreen) reachable via HUD + deep-link. Unreachable trophies (4-boss, fish, abilities, supply_chain) omitted; the React 'collection' tab (tile-collection) is separate and still pending.
Chronicle timeline of fired beats grouped by Act now shipped alongside the story engine and beat modal.

Tile-collection browser: a grouped gallery of the 23 wired tiles (farm/mine/hazard/fish) with art + name + category + produced resource, reachable via the 📖 HUD button + deep-link. Discovery/research/buy + tile-abilities deferred.
Basic recipe listing in TownScreen (2 recipes: Bakery/Kitchen); no rich station UI, no tier-gating UI. Logic is sound.

Login-streak rewards ported faithfully (DailyRewardConfig.gd — the 1..30 reward ladder verbatim from React DAILY_REWARDS + reward_for_day with the {coins:25} default) + GameState.login_tick(today) reproducing the React LOGIN_TICK streak math EXACTLY (idempotent same-day, +1 consecutive capped at 30, gap-resets to 1; grants coins/runes/tools). Fires on load (real system date), surfaced via DailyStreakModal after tutorial/story clear; reachable on demand via apply_deeplink('daily'/'streak'). React tool ids remapped to real ToolConfig ids (basic→scythe/rare→bomb/shuffle→rake); day-30 tile unlock dropped (no triceratops tile — no fakes). run_daily_rewards_tests.gd: 103 checks.
Active tool powers shipped (M8: ToolConfig/ToolEffects + GameState tool API + live board + ToolPalette). Passive abilities + magic-tool/portal influence economy remain absent.
Rats fully ported; fire/wolves absent. Rat tile art now fed (M7a); fire/wolves overlays remain absent.
Rubble (cave-in) ported; gas-vent/lava/mole absent. Rubble tile art now fed (M7a); gas-vent/lava/mole remain absent.

6-step onboarding modal (TutorialConfig + TutorialModal): shown once on first load (tutorial_seen flag persisted in GameState to_dict/from_dict), replayable via apply_deeplink('tutorial'). Sequenced before the story arrival beat so the two don't fight.
Trophy tracker (AchievementConfig.gd + GameState counters/bump_counter) and trophy view (AchievementsScreen) shipped. Collection tab (tile-collection) still pending.

Almanac XP/tier track ported (AlmanacConfig.gd — 150 XP/level curve, 10 tiers, level_for_xp/can_claim_tier) + GameState almanac_xp/level/claimed/structural with award_xp (+20 XP per quest claim) and claim_almanac_tier (gated on level; grants coins/runes/tools, latches structural honours). Shown as the Almanac tab in QuestsScreen. Verified headlessly by run_quests_tests.gd. Visual golden awaits M-infra.
DROPPED. Boons were the keeper-economy-coupled season modifiers; with the calendar-season cycle removed (Phase 7) and the keeper economy unported, there is nothing for boons to modify. Out of scope.
Boss encounter system ported (one boss, Frostmaw); modal confirmation re-skin handled by M5/M9.
Boss gallery/information view; only the single ported boss exists. Roster view lands with townsfolk in M10.

World-map view of 3 zones (home/mine/harbor) with roads + current-location marker; travel buttons launch the existing mine/harbor expeditions (gated on town2_complete). Settlement founding, per-zone inventory, discovery gating, road-building, and the full 11-node map are deferred (multi-settlement refactor parked).

CastleConfig (3 needs: soup 53 / meat 47 / coal→tile_mine_coal 43, verbatim from React data.ts) + GameState.contribute_to_castle — a one-way inventory sink that clamps to available (never over-contributes past target or on-hand) and persists defensively in to_dict/from_dict. Faithful port of src/features/castle/slice.ts; the React castle-as-tier-progression rework noted in data.ts is deferred.

CharterConfig.gd — the six Hollow-Pact terms (id/roman/title/description carried VERBATIM from src/features/charter/index.tsx PACT_TERMS) + the read-only derivation ported EXACTLY from React: term_related_entries, derive_term_state (violation→honored→pending precedence), term_caption (singular/plural + the '|| 1' count floor), state_pill_tone/label, format_choice_entry. READ-ONLY: there is NO slice/mutation in React either — the Charter only reflects story.choice_log + story.flags. KEY REMAP: the React terms reference React-story beat/flag ids (act1_first_harvest, act2_bram_arrives, act3_festival/win, keeper_path_coexist/driveout, …) that DO NOT EXIST in the re-scoped Godot story arc; a verbatim port would render 6 terms that can never resolve (a dead feature). So each term's related_beats/honored_flags/violation_flags are remapped to the Godot StoryConfig's REAL ids (every id asserted to exist by run_charter_tests.gd — the anti-dead-feature guard). Term V (drive_out_bite) is the cleanest: the Godot keeper-path choice drives it (keeper_path_bound=honored / keeper_path_broken=violated), recorded against the frostmaw_aftermath beat. The brief's table listed keeper_choice_made/keeper_path_* as related BEATS, but those are FLAGS — term V's related beats are frostmaw_aftermath + act2_frostmaw_felled instead (documented in CharterConfig.gd's header). DEFERRED: the golden-charter-* visual row awaits the M-infra visual suite.
Chronicle timeline of fired beats grouped by Act shipped (ChronicleScreen.gd). Beat/choice engine + modal also shipped (StoryEngine.gd + StoryModal.gd). NPC/keeper arcs pending.
Recipe system; Godot has 2 recipes (bakery/kitchen). Full station set + rich UI lands in M10.

DecorationConfig (8 decorations carried VERBATIM from src/features/decorations/data.ts: violet_bed/stone_lantern/apple_sapling/driftwood_arch/pearl_fountain/fishing_dock/cobble_well/smelter_brazier with their real coins+item costs and influence grants) + GameState.build_decoration / can_afford_decoration. Building deducts coins + each cost item from the shared inventory (floor/erase write pattern), bumps a per-decoration built count, and grants the new 'influence' currency (the Portal feature will spend it). influence + decorations persist defensively in to_dict/from_dict. Faithful port of src/features/decorations/slice.ts; the React per-LOCATION built model (built[loc].decorations) is simplified to a flat global decorations dict, and cost keys naming resources not yet produced in the port (berry/tile_fish_kelp/tile_fish_oyster) simply read as unaffordable.
Farm biome board ported; tile effects/art + farm-specific juice land in M7.
DROPPED. Seasonal-events modal tied to the removed calendar-season cycle. Out of scope.

Harbor biome: 6 fish tiles, tide cycle (high/low every 3 turns swaps the bottom-row pool), giant-pearl capture (≥2 fish chain adjacent → +1 rune), enter_harbor expedition (supplies→turns, mirrors the mine). Additive. Full cartography-gated zone entry deferred (no zones yet).
Inventory ledger ported; grid/list/search re-skin onto Theme+scenes lands in M5.
Market trades ported (sell+buy tested); buy UI surface + price drift land with the town surfaces in M6.
Mine expedition + rubble ported; full hazard set + tile art land in M7.
NPC roster (5 NPCs) + 0–10 bond + order-multiplier wiring shipped (NpcConfig.gd + GameState npcs). Per-NPC dialog pools and NPC gifts pending.
Orders logic + TownScreen section ported; re-skin onto Theme+scenes lands in M5.

PortalConfig (the 10-magic-tool catalog carried VERBATIM from src/features/portal/data.ts: magic_wand/hourglass/magic_seed/magic_fertilizer/golden_apple/golden_carrot/golden_idol/golden_sheep/philosophers_stone/miners_hat with their real influence costs + effect text + each tool's captured React power metadata) + GameState.build_portal / summon_magic_tool. The summon ECONOMY + build gate are ported: build_portal pays the React portal building's special coins+runes cost (2000 coins + 5 runes) and sets a portal_built flag; summon_magic_tool gates on portal_built + influence >= cost, deducts influence, and writes +1 DIRECTLY into the tools dict (exactly as the React slice does — grant_tool would reject a non-ToolConfig magic-tool id). portal_built persists defensively in to_dict/from_dict. Faithful port of src/features/portal/slice.ts. DEFERRED: the magic-tool EFFECTS (tap_clear_type/undo_move/restore_turns/fill_bias/transform_tiles/reveal_tiles) route through the global tool-power system in React (applyToolPower / ITEMS[key].power) and land with the Godot tool-powers milestone (M8); the fill_bias magic_fertilizerCharges CHAIN_COLLECTED decay is part of that same M8 infra and is intentionally not ported.

Deterministic 6-quest system ported (QuestConfig.gd — FNV-1a→mulberry32 seeded roll from (quest_seed, quest_day), tick_quest for collect/craft/order/tool/chain, is_claimable) + GameState quests/quest_day/reroll_quests/claim_quest, additively ticked at credit_chain (collect+chain), fill_order (order), craft (craft), use_tool_on_grid (tool); claim grants coins + 20 almanac XP. Templates scoped to port-reachable keys/recipes/tools (23 of the React pool; unreachable items/tiles/tool-ids omitted). Verified headlessly by run_quests_tests.gd (265 checks). Visual golden awaits M-infra.
DROPPED. The season-end recap needs a farm-session-end model the port deliberately does not have (no calendar seasons). Out of scope.
Options/mute pref ported in MenuScreen; re-skin onto Theme+scenes lands in M5.
Beat/choice engine (StoryEngine.gd + StoryState.gd) + beat modal (StoryModal.gd) shipped. 13 port-reachable beats wired at chain/tier/boss/build/order/session events. NPC/keeper arcs pending.
Tile-collection browser shipped: 23 wired tiles (farm/mine/hazard/fish) grouped by category, reachable via 📖 HUD button + deep-link. Discovery/research/buy deferred.
Townsfolk roster view (TownsfolkScreen.gd — 5 NPC cards with color avatar, name, role, bond bar tinted by tier) shipped. Quests/gifts sub-tabs and per-NPC dialog pending.
TutorialConfig.gd (6 steps: Welcome/Drag chains/Upgrades ★/Orders/Town/You're ready) + tutorial_seen flag in GameState. Steps wired into TutorialModal and tested headlessly via run_tutorial_tests.gd.
Recipe reference wiki shipped (RecipeWikiScreen — read-only list of RECIPES with inputs/output/station), reachable via the 🍳 HUD button + deep-link.

Hire-by-type workers (Farmer/Lumberjack/Miner/Baker) with ramped costs + passive ability reducers (category threshold -1/hire; Baker recipe-input -1) wired into credit_chain/craft; additive (0 hired = identical economy); hire/fire UI in TownScreen. Gift/dialog niceties deferred.

3 biomes (farm/mine/harbor) reachable via expeditions + a world-map view showing all 3 nodes/roads/current-location. True multi-zone settlement model (founding, per-zone inventory, discovery) deferred.

Spatial town map ported from src/townLayout.ts (TownLayout.gd) and rendered (TownMap.gd); reachable in-game via TownMapScreen with real GameState (plots from tier, built buildings as placeholder houses). Plots are now clickable (M6d): clicking an empty plot opens the build picker (lists buildings + costs, live can_build gating); clicking a built plot demolishes — reusing GameState.build/demolish; 53-check run_townmap_tests. Pan/zoom shipped (#1030 — bottom-left +/-/recenter controls driving a real TownMap view transform + drag-to-pan with tap-vs-drag disambiguation; verified by run_townmap_tests + the _zoom_diag transform check). Per-plot spatial placement (a build landing on the exact clicked plot) remains pending — placement is still ordinal.
Main puzzle board gameplay; renders but lacks tile art + effects until M7.

Trophy tab (AchievementsScreen — grouped rows, progress bars, unlocked/locked, rewards) shipped; reachable via HUD button + apply_deeplink. Collection tab + golden await tile-collection + M-infra visual suite.
DROPPED. Season-modifiers view — see slice-boons. Out of scope.
Boss gallery; only the single ported boss exists.

CartographyScreen renders the 3-zone world map (home/mine/harbor nodes + roads + current-location marker); travel buttons launch the existing mine/harbor expeditions (gated on town2_complete). Settlement founding, keeper/road-building, and full 11-node map deferred.

CastleScreen — parchment modal (mirrors AchievementsScreen) listing the 3 Castle needs, each with a contributed/target progress bar, a 'Have: N' line, and Contribute 1 / All(N) buttons wired to game.contribute_to_castle (buttons disabled at 0-on-hand or when the need is met). Reachable via the 🏰 HUD button + deep-link 'castle'/'keep'. Faithful port of src/features/castle/index.tsx.

CharterScreen.gd — parchment modal (mirrors PortalScreen/DecorationsScreen) for the read-only Charter. A settlement ribbon ('Hearthwood Vale' + 'N turn(s) elapsed' from game.turn + a 'Hollow Pact' tag), a Terms/All-choices tab toggle, and the two tabs from src/features/charter/index.tsx: TERMS shows the 6 term cards (roman numeral + title + a derived caption + a state-coloured honored/violated/pending pill); clicking a card opens an in-screen DETAIL overlay (the term description + a 'Where it was tested' list of related choice-log entries, or the empty-state line). ALL CHOICES shows the choices TIMELINE (beat title + 'Act N' + the resolved choice label; Godot choice_log rows carry no ts/value so neither is rendered — faithful to the data the port records). Reachable via the '⚖️' HUD button + deep-link 'charter'/'pact'. Faithful port of the React view; the beat/flag GATES behind each term are remapped to the Godot story arc (see slice-charter). DEFERRED: the golden-charter-* visual row awaits the M-infra visual suite.
ChronicleScreen.gd shipped — timeline of fired beats grouped by Act, "N/total chapters" counter, reachable via HUD button + apply_deeplink("chronicle"). Visual golden awaits M-infra visual suite.
Recipe crafting interface; basic listing today, rich station UI in M10.

DecorationsScreen — parchment modal (mirrors CastleScreen) with a '✨ N Influence' header and one card per decoration: name, cost chips (coins ◉ + each resource amount), a '+N ✨' influence grant, a '×N' built-count badge, and a Build button wired to game.build_decoration (disabled when unaffordable via can_afford_decoration). Reachable via the 🌷 HUD button + deep-link 'decorations'/'decor'. Faithful port of src/features/decorations/index.tsx.
Resource inventory and search; re-skin onto Theme+scenes in M5.
NPC trade orders; re-skin onto Theme+scenes in M5.

PortalScreen — parchment modal (mirrors DecorationsScreen) with two states. NOT built: an empty-state line + a 'Build Portal' button showing the one-time cost (2000 ◉ + 5 runes), disabled unless game.can_build_portal(), wired to game.build_portal(). BUILT: a '✨ Influence: N' header + one card per magic tool (name, effect text, a '×N' owned badge via game.tool_count, and a 'Summon (cost✨)' button wired to game.summon_magic_tool, disabled when game.influence < cost). Reachable via the 🌀 HUD button + deep-link 'portal'/'summon'. Faithful port of src/features/portal/index.tsx. DEFERRED: NO 'Use/Activate' button — the magic-tool effects route through the global tool-power system (M8), so a Use button would be a dead control; it is intentionally omitted (no fakes).

QuestsScreen.gd shipped — parchment modal with a Quests / Almanac tab toggle: the Quests tab lists the 6 rolled quests (label, coin + ✦XP reward, progress bar gold-when-complete / green-when-partial, Claim gated on completion); the Almanac tab shows the XP/level header + the 10-tier list with claim buttons gated on level. Reachable via the 📋 HUD button + apply_deeplink('quests'/'almanac'). Visual golden awaits M-infra.
TileCollectionScreen shipped: 23 wired tiles grouped by category (farm/mine/hazard/fish), reachable via 📖 HUD button + apply_deeplink("tiles"). Discovery/research/buy UI deferred.
Townsfolk roster view shipped (TownsfolkScreen.gd — 5 NPC cards, reachable via '👥' HUD button + apply_deeplink('townsfolk')). Visual golden awaits M-infra visual suite.
Recipe wiki view shipped (RecipeWikiScreen).
MenuScreen ported; re-skin onto ModalShell + router in M5.
Boss confirmation ported; weather/run-summary polish in M9.

TutorialModal.gd (CanvasLayer, parchment card + scrim, Cinzel title, body, step indicator, Next/Got it!/Skip buttons). Shown once on first load, replayable via apply_deeplink('tutorial'). ViewRouter.Modal.TUTORIAL added.

DebugModal.gd — a deeplink-only dev overlay (apply_deeplink('debug'), no permanent HUD button, matching the hidden React debug modal): a live STATE readout (coins/runes/influence/turn/tier/biome/town2/inventory/quests/almanac/streak), a JUMP-TO grid of 19 deduped deeplink buttons (the QA index of every screen), and quick-grant buttons backed by REAL methods (+coins/+runes/+influence, try_tier_up, reroll_quests, SaveManager.clear) that refresh the HUD. run_debug_tests.gd: 72 checks. Golden captured in the visual suite.
DROPPED. Seasonal-events modal — see slice-festivals. Out of scope.
DROPPED. Season-end summary modal — see slice-runsummary. Out of scope.

LeaveBoardModal.gd — a parchment confirm that arms ONLY when the player is in an expedition (active_biome != 'farm'); the 🏠 Town button routes through it, Confirm calls leave_mine/leave_harbor and re-pools the board onto the farm (farm flow unchanged, no modal). apply_deeplink('leaveboard'). Verified by run_m5_polish_tests.gd; golden captured in the visual suite.
DROPPED. Season-transition prompt tied to the removed calendar-season cycle. Out of scope.
Farm board renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario board-farm-idle, 0% pixel-diff). Tile art is the v1 procedural set; v2 animated art feed is the remaining M7 polish.
Farm with 7-tile chain highlight; tile art + chain-glow polish (M7).
Farm with fire and rat hazards; rat tile art now fed (M7a). Fire system + overlay infra still pending M-infra visual suite for the golden itself.
Farm with rake tool active; tool logic + ToolPalette HUD now exist (M8a–M8d, rake is in the catalog). The visual golden itself awaits the M-infra visual suite.
Farm with bomb tool active; tool logic + ToolPalette HUD now exist (M8a–M8d, bomb is in the catalog and in the starter grant). The visual golden itself awaits the M-infra visual suite.
Farm with sickle tool active; tool logic + ToolPalette HUD now exist (M8a–M8d, sickle is in the catalog). The visual golden itself awaits the M-infra visual suite.
Farm with fertilizer effect; depends on M8 tool-powers.
Mine biome board at start; needs mine tile art feed (M7).
Mine with cave-in/gas-vent/lava hazards; rubble tile art now fed (M7a). Gas-vent/lava overlays + M-infra visual suite still pending for the golden itself.
Harbor board renders (screenshot fish-harbor.png: water-tinted board, 6 fish tiles, giant pearl, catch stockpile). Visual golden diff awaits M-infra visual suite.
Pearl placement/degrade and low-tide board mutation mechanics shipped; visual golden awaits M-infra visual suite.
Boss encounter active on board; weather polish lands with M9.
Boss encounter minimized; weather polish lands with M9.
Boss with weather effects; depends on M9 weather GPUParticles.
Fresh spatial town map (no buildings) renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario town-map, 0% diff).
Spatial town map with built buildings (lumber_camp/coop/garden houses placed on plots) renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario town-built-out, 0% diff).
Building placement tooltip; depends on M6 Plot/BuildingTooltip scenes.
Building placement mode active; depends on M6.
Build picker with enabled Build rows renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario town-build-picker, City tier + stocked, 0% diff).
Building picker with locked buildings; depends on M6.
Biome selection for new settlement; the 3-zone map VIEW exists (CartographyScreen), but settlement founding (multi-settlement refactor) is deferred.
Blocked unfounded zone; depends on M10 cartography.
Town market news/prices; market BUY surface wired into the M6 town.

Harbor zone settlement view; the harbor BIOME (board + expedition) is now ported (slice-fish partial), but a harbor SETTLEMENT/zone — a second founded town on the harbor — depends on M10 cartography/zones founding.
Mine zone settlement view; depends on M10 zones.
Inventory ledger renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario inventory, 0% pixel-diff).
Inventory list view; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.
Inventory search empty-state ('No items match …') renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario inventory-search-empty, 0% diff).
Inventory with some resources; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.
Inventory nearly full; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.
Bakery crafting station recipes; rich station UI in M10.
Locked crafting station; tier-gating UI in M10.
World map renders the 3-zone map with current-home marker + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario cartography, 0% pixel-diff).
Map with no zone selected; depends on M10 cartography.
Map with capital zone locked; depends on M10 cartography.
Map founder selection modal; the 3-zone map VIEW exists (CartographyScreen), but settlement founding is deferred (multi-settlement refactor parked).
Map showing road ready to build; the 3-zone map VIEW exists (CartographyScreen with static roads rendered), but player-built road-building mechanic is deferred.
Map with founded settlement complete; the 3-zone map VIEW exists (CartographyScreen), but settlement founding (multi-settlement model) is deferred.
Map with keeper trial choice; the 3-zone map VIEW exists (CartographyScreen), but the keeper/founding flow is deferred (multi-settlement refactor parked).
Town orders section renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario orders, 0% pixel-diff).
DROPPED. Golden for the dropped boons feature. Out of scope.
Boss encounter modal; re-skin/weather polish in M9.
Charter terms screen renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario charter, seeded flags, 0% pixel-diff).
Charter term-detail overlay (description + 'Where it was tested') renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario charter-term-dialog, 0% diff).
Empty chronicle (0/13 chapters, 'Your story begins…') renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario chronicle-empty, 0% diff).
Chronicle timeline renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario chronicle, seeded beats, 0% pixel-diff).
Trophy screen renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario achievements, seeded unlocks, 0% pixel-diff).
Achievements collection tab; depends on M10 achievements.
Tile collection farm grass entry; depends on M10 tile-collection.
Tile-collection gallery renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario tiles, 0% pixel-diff).
Tile collection water fish entry; depends on M10 tile-collection + fish.
Tile collection hazards entries; depends on M10 tile-collection.
Tile collection activation state; depends on M10 tile-collection.
Tile collection buy with coins; depends on M10 tile-collection.
Tile collection free moves chip; depends on M10 tile-collection.
Tile collection research progress; depends on M10 tile-collection.
Mine entry locked; entry-cost surface lands with M10 zones.
Mine entry with no provisions; entry surface lands with M10 zones.
Quests tab renders the 6 quests with mixed states + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario quests, 0% pixel-diff).
Almanac tab renders (XP/level header + 10-tier list with level-gated claims). Visual golden diff awaits M-infra visual suite.
DROPPED. Golden for the dropped season-end summary. Out of scope.
Town view (spatial village map) renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario town-map, 0% diff).
Settings menu renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario menu, 0% pixel-diff).
Settings menu options tab; re-skin golden recaptured in M5.
Debug modal renders the live state readout + jump grid + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario debug, 0% diff).
Leave-board confirm renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario leaveboard, 0% diff).
Toast bubble renders at full opacity + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario toast, fade-tween frozen for determinism, 0% diff).
Tutorial in corner; depends on M10 tutorial.
Tutorial onboarding modal renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario tutorial, 0% pixel-diff).
Start farming with default board; start-flow/tile-chooser lands with M10.
Start farming with tile selection; depends on M10 tile-collection/start flow.
Story HUD bar on board not yet ported (the beat modal and chronicle view now render but the in-board story progress bar is still absent). Visual golden awaits M-infra visual suite.
Story beat modal renders + committed golden (run_visual_tests.gd scenario story-prompt, 0% pixel-diff).
Choice-bearing beats now render in StoryModal.gd (choice buttons drain beat_queue, only explicit choices grant). Visual golden diff awaits M-infra visual suite.
Story win condition; depends on M10 story.

Townsfolk roster view now renders (TownsfolkScreen.gd — screenshot townsfolk.png captured: 5 cards, mira Liked, bram Sour, rest Warm). The bosses sub-tab is distinct React content; visual golden awaits M-infra visual suite.
Townsfolk roster view now renders (screenshot townsfolk.png). Workers sub-tab depends on the hired worker-type ability system, which is not yet ported. Visual golden awaits M-infra visual suite.
Townsfolk castle sub-tab depends on unported castle/charter system.
Townsfolk quests sub-tab depends on unported quests system.

GdUnit4 v6.1.3 ADOPTED — addon vendored at godot/addons/gdUnit4/, a real starter suite under godot/test/ (5 GdUnitTestSuite classes / 46 test methods over BoardLogic, GameState economy, QuestConfig, AlmanacConfig, DailyRewardConfig, mirroring the proven run_*.gd assertions), run headless via GdUnitCmdTool as a HARD CI gate (godot-gdunit4 job, exits 0 only when all pass). The 45 legacy run_*.gd runners (~3500 checks) are INTENTIONALLY kept as the comprehensive compatibility harness; per-system migration to GdUnit4 classes is incremental. project.godot untouched (CLI runner needs no plugin registration).

Real-InputEvent e2e harness (run_e2e_input.gd) drives the live Main via root.push_input: HUD button clicks open screens + a seeded board drag resolves a 3-chain. Port of ~3 Playwright flows; more flows + GdUnit4 migration pending.

Visual golden-diff suite shipped (run_visual_tests.gd): scenario×viewport (720×1280 portrait) capture of 19 surfaces, platform-tagged goldens under godot/tests/visual/__goldens__/<OS>/, tolerant pixel-diff (channelΔ>12 fails at >1% of pixels) with a render-smoke fallback where a platform golden is absent. Skips cleanly under --headless (keeps the CI sweep green); a best-effort xvfb 'godot-visual' CI job render-smokes on Linux. Windows goldens committed + 0% diff verified; Linux strict goldens deferred (committed on first stable CI render).

Closes the 'export succeeds but untested' gap. tools/serve-godot-dist.mjs serves the Web export with correct MIME; tests/godot-web/boot.spec.ts boots it in headless Chromium and asserts the engine reaches _ready (a web-only JavaScriptBridge beacon window.__hearthGodotReady), a live <canvas> with a GL context, and zero uncaught page errors. Wired as a hard gate in the godot-web-export CI job (npm ci + playwright). Verified locally: boots in ~2s, smoke green; headless GDScript sweep unaffected (beacon guarded by OS.has_feature('web')).
Built + WIRED into godot-ci.yml (parity-matrix-check job) and the CI now auto-runs all 36 run_*.gd suites (was a hardcoded subset).

Desktop framing shipped: project.godot adds a resizable, HiDPI-allowed window that opens at a desktop-friendly 540×960 (the base 720×1280 resolution is preserved; stretch=canvas_items/keep pillarboxes the portrait content at non-9:16 windows) + a runtime 360×640 min_size in Main._ready() (guarded non-headless/non-web). The hand-authored project.godot keys (aspect=keep, emulate_mouse_from_touch) are preserved (additions-only). run_visual_tests.gd now iterates viewports with a second 1280×800 'desktop' viewport (5 committed desktop goldens: board/town-map/cartography/inventory/menu, 0% diff) verifying the layout frames correctly on desktop. _layout() needed no change — get_viewport_rect() stays 720×1280 under stretch=keep, so the HUD/board centre with no clipping. Mobile-app store export (iOS/Android signing) remains externally blocked.
